description: Philomatic's built-in vocabulary — the tags that carry meaning on generic edges (LINK / ABOUT / INCLUDES) and the overlay metadata vocabularies. The engine never interprets these; UIs render them and (F1, later) validation rules report over them.

edgeTags.name: Explains
edgeTags.description: covers the theory — a candidate pool, never auto-pulled into a track

edgeTags.name: Demonstrates
edgeTags.description: shows the concept applied in practice

edgeTags.name: Seminal
edgeTags.description: the cornerstone source of this track

edgeTags.name: Foundational
edgeTags.description: a concept this track is built around

edgeTags.name: Complements
edgeTags.description: these two tracks go well together

edgeTags.name: AnalogousTo
edgeTags.description: these two concepts rhyme — understanding one helps with the other

edgeTags.name: SubfieldOf
edgeTags.description: this field of study specializes that one (ML #SubfieldOf CS) — taxonomy, NOT learning order: a subfield is not a prerequisite (PREREQUISITE_OF stays the sequencing primitive). Fields ARE concepts when they are things you learn about; classifying OTHER entities into a field stays a #domain:* tag

edgeTags.name: TopicOf
edgeTags.description: this concept is subject matter WITHIN that field (Normality #TopicOf Descriptive Statistics) — the middle rung of the taxonomy: #SubfieldOf is field-inside-field, #TopicOf is topic-inside-field, and classifying non-concept entities into a field stays a #domain:* tag. Not learning order (PREREQUISITE_OF) and not containment of meaning — a topic can belong to several fields

edgeTags.name: DrawsOn
edgeTags.description: this field borrows methods or results from that one (Cognitive Science #DrawsOn Linguistics) — interdisciplinary influence, weaker than #SubfieldOf and looser than #IsEvidenceFor

edgeTags.name: RefersTo
edgeTags.description: keep that source at hand while working through this one

edgeTags.name: DerivativeOf
edgeTags.description: based on that one — a summary, translation, or adaptation
